title: Better Enchantment Order
description: A Simple, Visual Only, Datapack that changes the Tooltip Order of Enchantments!
body:
# Better Enchantment Order
Better Enchantment Order updates the tooltip order that Vanilla Minecraft Has. This is a datapack/mod which means it only works on the servers end or in single player. The ordering of this goes from the highest possible number of an enchantment to the lowest possible, which alphabetical order through the number areas.
## Example of the change
![Before & After Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec88fad34bfdcc30e6d1ee87fd3453716657a53f.png)
